subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! We have indeed heard the melodies of thy secret heart and the raptures of thy breast in thy love for God and thy submergence in Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مهدی قد سمعنا نغمات سرک و جذبات صدرک فی حبک الی الله و استغراقک فیه و
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @presence of; reunion with God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
